reviews.comment:
Las instalaciones del Automóvil Club son el lugar adecuado para hacer un alto en el viaje y despejarse de la monotonía de la autopista.
Junto a la estación de servicio (con su bar / cafetería) hay un parque con mesas bajo los árboles y algunas hamacas. El lugar está bien mantenido.

(Translated by Google)
The Automobile Club facilities are the perfect place to stop off on your trip and escape the monotony of the highway.
Next to the service station (with its bar/café), there's a park with tables under the trees and a few hammocks. The area is well maintained.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnNEpmTWdRRRAB

(Translated by Google)
A place to rest along the way

reviews.comment:
Es uno de los mejores lugares para parar a descansar justo en el limite entre Santa Fe y Cordoba  esta 2 km dentro de la ruta, pero vale la pena ya que cuenta con una gran area verde con arboles y varias mesas con asiento distribuidas por el lugar, tambien se puede cargar combustible y tiene una tienda tipo shop para abasteserce de agua caliente, bebidas, refrigerios, alfajores para el que se olvido de llevar algun recuerdo, es especial si viajas con niños y mascota porque tendran un gran area para correr.

(Translated by Google)
It's one of the best places to stop and rest, right on the border between Santa Fe and Cordoba. It's 2 km along the highway, but it's worth it because it has a large green area with trees and several tables with seating distributed around the place. You can also refuel and there's a shop where you can stock up on hot water, drinks, snacks, and alfajores for those who forgot to bring a souvenir. It's especially good if you're traveling with children and pets because they'll have a large area to run around.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzN3J1TVhBEAE
